prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-7PC-1LB-PAYDIRT-PARENT-AMZ Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 7pc 1lb Paydirt Gold Panning Kit, Prospecting Equipment Tools Description: If you're looking to progress your gold panning skills, look no further than the ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo Beginner Paydirt Gold Panning Kits.

With the included paydirt from ASR Outdoor brand ambassador Bobby Bo, you never have to travel to a claim site. From the comfort of your home, develop and advance your gold panning skills and techniques with just the few pieces of gold prospecting equipment included in these gold panning kits.

The included 1lbs bags are available in beginner, intermediate and advanced paydirt levels and incrementally increase in difficulty where classification and gold extraction are concerned. The kits include x1 10 inch gold pan (available in black or green), x1 3oz snifter bottle, x1 glass storage vial and x1 pipette; the intermediate and advanced gold panning kits also include a magnetic separator tool to combat black sand and other magnetic materials included in those previously mentioned paydirt bags.

Suitable for different levels of gold prospectors, all gold panning kits are excellent for those looking to advance or keep their gold panning skills and techniques sharp. Search Terms: gold rush panning pan kit paydirt pay dirt mining tools sluice box equipment rock hounding adult hobby him outdoor activities kids camping gear travel sports and outdoors rush fathers day gifts Features: - PAYDIRT GOLD PANNING KIT: Enhance your gold panning skills at home with these 1LB unclassified paydirt and 7 piece essential gold prospecting tools before going out in the field - GOLD PANNING PAYDIRT: 1LB bag of paydirt vary in skill evel from beginner, to intermediate and finally advanced; each level of paydirt will incrementally increase in difficultly and require different levels of classification and extraction skills - GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Gold panning kit includes 1lbs paydirt bag, 10 inch gold pan, 3oz snifter bottle, glass vial, pipette and in the intermediate and advanced kits, a magnetic separator tool is also included - BLACK SAND MAGNET: A must have gold mining tool; this will allow you to quickly and effectively pull out black sand and other magnetic iron materials from your gold rich paydirt, making it easier to spot gold in your working concentrate - NOTE: Dual riffle pans included in the beginner kits must be seasoned; traditional single riffle finishing pans included in the intermediate and advanced paydirt gold panning kits do not require seasoning === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7pc 1lb Paydirt Gold Panning Kit
